name: Benedicte Maurseth
abstract: Benedicte Maurseth (born 7 February 1983) is a Norwegian traditional folk singer and musician.

about_quotes.speaker: Marilyn Crispell
about_quotes.evidence: One of the people I met in recent years is a woman named Benedicte Maurseth.
about_quotes.doc_title: Marilyn Crispell interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, January 21, 2022
